case_title: CLIFFORD JOHN G. et al VS COONEY DAVID

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,478.00 FILED BY CLIFFORD JOHN G. ATTARD CHARLENE A. AS TO DEFENDANT COONEY DAVID ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-24-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 07

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CLIFFORD JOHN G. ATTARD CHARLENE A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT COONEY DAVID $391.29 PRINCIPAL, $32.95 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $424.24, JUDGMENT INCLUDES $600.00 CREDIT FOR SECURITY DEPOSIT STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT COONEY DAVID
MOTION FOR ASSIGNMENT OF JUDGMENT GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION. FOLDER SENT TO SC 7/22/93.
